body_length: 成虫体长约 7-10 mm，翅展约 15-18 mm
distribution: 广泛分布于东亚、东南亚和南亚稻区，在温暖潮湿的水稻种植区最常见。
active_season: 水稻生长季高发，通常为 5-10 月，南方可延长。
description: 稻纵卷叶螟是亚洲稻区常见鳞翅目害虫，幼虫会把稻叶卷成筒状并取食叶肉，降低叶片光合能力，重发时可显著影响产量。
morphology: 成虫体色黄褐至淡褐，前翅具波纹状斑纹；幼虫细长淡绿，受惊后会在卷叶内快速躲藏。
habits: 夜间成虫趋光并产卵于叶面，幼虫孵化后卷叶取食；田间高温高湿、氮肥偏多时更易暴发。

source_refs.authority: JICA / Cambodia Rice Insect Pests and Their Management Guidebook
source_refs.title: Rice leaf folder

body_length_en: Adults are about 7-10 mm long with a wingspan of roughly 15-18 mm.
distribution_en: Widely distributed across rice-growing regions of East, Southeast, and South Asia, especially in warm and humid paddies.
active_season_en: Most active during the rice growing season, usually from May to October, and longer in southern areas.
description_en: The rice leaf roller is a common lepidopteran rice pest in Asia. Larvae roll rice leaves into tubes and scrape leaf tissue, reducing photosynthetic area and potentially lowering yield under heavy infestation.
morphology_en: Adults are yellowish brown with wavy markings on the forewings. Larvae are slender and greenish, and quickly retreat into rolled leaves when disturbed.
habits_en: Adults are nocturnal and attracted to light. Eggs are laid on leaves, and newly hatched larvae begin feeding inside rolled leaves. Hot, humid fields with excess nitrogen often favor outbreaks.

body_length: 老熟幼虫约 20-30 mm，成虫体长约 10-15 mm
distribution: 广泛分布于东亚、东南亚及其他温带至亚热带稻作区。
active_season: 多在 4-10 月危害水稻，南方一年多代。
description: 二化螟是水稻重要钻蛀性害虫，幼虫蛀入叶鞘和茎秆，造成分蘖期枯心、抽穗期白穗。
morphology: 成虫淡黄褐色，前翅较狭长；幼虫乳白至淡黄色，头壳褐色，身体较光滑。
habits: 雌蛾多在叶片产卵，初孵幼虫取食叶鞘后迅速钻蛀茎秆；高密植和连作稻田常加重发生。
body_length_en: Mature larvae are about 20-30 mm long; adults are roughly 10-15 mm in body length.
distribution_en: Widely distributed in East and Southeast Asia and other temperate to subtropical rice-growing areas.
active_season_en: Usually damages rice from April to October, with multiple generations in southern regions.
description_en: The Asiatic rice borer is a major stem-boring pest of rice. Larvae tunnel into leaf sheaths and stems, causing dead hearts during tillering and white heads at heading stage.
morphology_en: Adults are pale yellowish brown with narrow forewings. Larvae are creamy white to pale yellow with a brown head capsule and a smooth body.
habits_en: Females lay eggs on rice leaves. Young larvae feed briefly on leaf sheaths before boring into stems. Dense planting and continuous rice cultivation often increase field risk.

body_length: 成虫体长约 3.5-4.5 mm
distribution: 广布于东亚、东南亚和南亚稻区，可随季风迁飞。
active_season: 水稻分蘖至灌浆期常见，通常 5-10 月高发。
description: 白背飞虱为水稻刺吸式害虫，群集吸食汁液可致叶片黄化、植株衰弱，严重时出现“虱烧”。
morphology: 成虫体形纺锤状，背部中轴常见白色条纹；若虫灰白或淡褐，善于在稻株基部聚集。
habits: 以若虫和成虫吸食稻株汁液，繁殖快、迁飞能力强，在高氮密植田块更易形成高密度种群。
body_length_en: Adults are about 3.5-4.5 mm long.
distribution_en: Widely found in East, Southeast, and South Asian rice ecosystems and capable of seasonal migration.
active_season_en: Common from tillering to grain filling, usually peaking from May to October.
description_en: The white-backed planthopper is a sap-sucking rice pest. Heavy feeding can yellow plants, weaken rice stands, and lead to hopperburn under severe infestations.
morphology_en: Adults are spindle-shaped and usually show a pale whitish stripe along the back. Nymphs are grayish white to pale brown and cluster near the plant base.
habits_en: Both nymphs and adults feed on plant sap. Populations build quickly and migrate well, especially in dense rice fields with high nitrogen input.

body_length: 成虫体长约 2.5-4.0 mm
distribution: 原产北美，现已扩散至亚洲部分稻区，是多地检疫关注对象。
active_season: 秧苗返青至分蘖初期危害明显，春末夏初较常见。
description: 稻水象甲是水稻根部害虫，成虫啃食叶片形成长条缺刻，幼虫在水下取食根系，导致植株生长受抑。
morphology: 成虫灰褐色，吻部明显，体表覆盖鳞片；幼虫乳白、无足，主要生活于根际泥水中。
habits: 越冬成虫迁入稻田后取食并产卵于叶鞘组织，幼虫孵化后入土危害根系，长期淹水田受害更重。

source_refs.title: Rice Water Weevil in Louisiana rice

body_length_en: Adults are about 2.5-4.0 mm long.
distribution_en: Native to North America but now introduced into several Asian rice-growing regions and treated as a quarantine concern in many areas.
active_season_en: Most damaging from seedling establishment to early tillering, especially in late spring and early summer.
description_en: The rice water weevil is a root-feeding pest of rice. Adults notch leaves, while larvae feed on roots below the waterline and stunt plant growth.
morphology_en: Adults are grayish brown with a distinct snout and a scaly body surface. Larvae are creamy white, legless, and live in muddy root zones.
habits_en: Overwintered adults invade paddies, feed, and lay eggs in leaf sheaths. Larvae then move into the soil and attack roots, with flooded fields often suffering more injury.

body_length: 幼虫体长通常 10-40 mm，随种类与龄期差异较大
distribution: 广泛分布于农田、草地和苗圃土壤环境中。
active_season: 春夏秋均可在土中见到，温暖季节取食最活跃。
description: “蛴螬”是金龟子类幼虫的统称，主要生活在土壤中咬食根系、地下茎和萌芽，对幼苗成活影响明显。
morphology: 体形弯曲呈 C 字形，乳白色，头部褐色，胸足发达，腹部肥厚。
habits: 昼伏土中，夜间或阴湿环境中活动增强；常在有机质丰富、杂草多的地块聚集。
body_length_en: Larvae usually range from 10-40 mm depending on species and instar.
distribution_en: Common in agricultural soils, grasslands, nurseries, and organically rich fields.
active_season_en: Present in soil through spring, summer, and autumn, with highest feeding activity in warm seasons.
description_en: "Grub" here refers to scarab beetle larvae as a pest group. They live in soil and chew roots, underground stems, and germinating tissues, often reducing seedling establishment.
morphology_en: Typical larvae are creamy white and C-shaped, with a brown head capsule, well-developed thoracic legs, and a swollen abdomen.
habits_en: They remain in soil by day and become more active in moist conditions. Populations often build in weedy or organic-rich plots.

body_length: 成虫多为 30-50 mm，前足强壮适于掘土
distribution: 广布于温暖地区农田、草坪和苗圃土壤中。
active_season: 春夏季最活跃，夜间活动明显。
description: 蝼蛄为典型地下害虫，能掘隧道并切断根系、幼茎，导致苗木倒伏、缺苗断垄。
morphology: 身体圆筒形，前足铲状，适于挖掘；体色褐黄至暗褐，触角短。
habits: 多栖息于潮湿疏松土壤，夜间取食和鸣叫，成若虫均可危害地下部组织。
body_length_en: Adults commonly measure 30-50 mm and have heavily modified digging forelegs.
distribution_en: Widely distributed in warm regions, especially in farmland, turf, and nursery soils.
active_season_en: Most active in spring and summer, especially at night.
description_en: Mole crickets are subterranean orthopteran pests that tunnel through soil and cut roots and young stems, causing seedling loss and lodging.
morphology_en: They have a cylindrical body, broad shovel-like forelegs for digging, and yellow-brown to dark brown coloration.
habits_en: They favor moist, loose soils and feed underground. Both nymphs and adults can injure belowground plant parts, with nocturnal activity being especially obvious.

body_length: 幼虫通常 10-25 mm，体细长坚硬
distribution: 广泛分布于旱地、玉米地、马铃薯地和苗床土壤。
active_season: 春播后至夏季危害明显，土壤湿凉时更活跃。
description: 金针虫是叩甲幼虫的统称，主要危害种子、块根和幼苗地下茎，常造成缺苗和烂种。
morphology: 幼虫黄褐色至棕黄色，细长硬实，体节明显，外表光滑似金属丝。
habits: 长期栖息土中，喜阴湿环境；对新播种子和幼根取食性强，轮作和整地不足时更易积累。
body_length_en: Larvae usually range from 10-25 mm and have a narrow, hard body.
distribution_en: Widely distributed in dryland crops, maize, potato fields, and seedbeds.
active_season_en: Damage is most common after spring planting and in cool, moist soil conditions.
description_en: "Wireworm" refers to click beetle larvae as a pest group. They attack seeds, roots, and underground stems, often causing poor emergence and stand loss.
morphology_en: Larvae are yellow to brownish yellow, slender, smooth, and hard-bodied, giving them a wire-like appearance.
habits_en: They spend most of their life in the soil and favor shady, moist conditions. Newly planted seeds and young roots are especially vulnerable.

body_length: 老熟幼虫约 35-50 mm，成虫翅展约 40-55 mm
distribution: 世界多地有分布，在玉米、蔬菜和多种旱作物区常见。
active_season: 春末夏初幼苗期危害最重，夜间取食明显。
description: 黑地老虎是典型切根性夜蛾害虫，低龄幼虫取食叶片，高龄幼虫常在地表附近咬断幼苗。
morphology: 幼虫灰黑或褐黑，体表油亮；成虫前翅深褐并具肾纹和环纹。
habits: 幼虫昼伏夜出，白天躲藏于土缝或残茬下；杂草多、前茬覆盖重的地块往往虫量更高。
body_length_en: Mature larvae are about 35-50 mm long, and adults have a wingspan of roughly 40-55 mm.
distribution_en: Distributed across many parts of the world and common in maize, vegetables, and other upland crops.
active_season_en: Most damaging in late spring and early summer during the seedling stage, with strong nocturnal feeding.
description_en: The black cutworm is a typical cutworm pest. Young larvae skeletonize leaves, while older larvae cut seedlings near the soil surface.
morphology_en: Larvae are gray-black to dark brown and appear greasy. Adults are dark brown with characteristic orbicular and kidney-shaped wing markings.
habits_en: Larvae hide in cracks or crop residue during the day and feed at night. Fields with abundant weeds or residue often face greater risk.

body_length: 老熟幼虫约 20-30 mm，成虫翅展约 20-34 mm
distribution: 广布于东亚和东南亚玉米产区。
active_season: 6-9 月玉米拔节至灌浆期危害显著，多代区持续时间更长。
description: 玉米螟是玉米钻蛀性害虫，幼虫可取食心叶、穗轴和茎秆，导致折秆、秃尖和籽粒减产。
morphology: 成虫黄褐色，前翅具波状纹；幼虫淡黄至肉红色，背线较明显。
habits: 卵块多产于叶背，幼虫初期取食心叶后钻蛀茎秆和果穗；高温季节繁殖较快。
body_length_en: Mature larvae are about 20-30 mm long and adults have a wingspan of roughly 20-34 mm.
distribution_en: Widely distributed in East and Southeast Asian maize-growing regions.
active_season_en: Most serious from June to September during stem elongation through grain filling, and longer in multi-generation areas.
description_en: The Asian corn borer is a major boring pest of maize. Larvae feed in whorls and tunnel into stalks and ears, causing breakage, poor ear fill, and yield loss.
morphology_en: Adults are yellowish brown with wavy forewing lines. Larvae are pale yellow to pinkish with a visible dorsal line.
habits_en: Egg masses are laid on leaf undersides. Young larvae feed in whorls before boring into stalks and ears. Warm weather supports rapid population growth.

body_length: 老熟幼虫约 30-40 mm，成虫翅展约 35-45 mm
distribution: 广泛分布于东亚和南亚的麦类、玉米及禾本科作物区。
active_season: 春夏秋均可发生，迁飞性强，常在梅雨至盛夏形成高峰。
description: 粘虫是禾本科作物重要暴食性害虫，大发生时幼虫可成群迁移取食，短时间内造成严重失叶。
morphology: 幼虫体色多变，常具纵纹；成虫前翅灰褐，后翅较浅。
habits: 成虫迁飞能力强，卵产于叶片，幼虫昼夜均可取食，高龄时常呈群集和转移危害特点。
body_length_en: Mature larvae are about 30-40 mm long and adults have a wingspan of roughly 35-45 mm.
distribution_en: Widely distributed in East and South Asia in wheat, maize, and other grass crop systems.
active_season_en: Can occur in spring, summer, and autumn, with migration peaks often appearing from rainy season to midsummer.
description_en: The oriental armyworm is a serious foliar pest of grasses and cereals. During outbreaks, larvae feed gregariously and can move in waves across fields.
morphology_en: Larval coloration varies, but longitudinal stripes are usually visible. Adults are gray-brown with lighter hindwings.
habits_en: Adults migrate well and lay eggs on host leaves. Larvae feed heavily, and older larvae may move collectively when food becomes scarce.

body_length: 成虫一般 1-4 mm
distribution: 广布于全球农田、果园和园艺系统中。
active_season: 温暖季节繁殖最快，设施栽培中可全年发生。
description: 蚜虫是典型刺吸式害虫，可直接吸食植物汁液并分泌蜜露，还常传播多种植物病毒。
morphology: 个体柔软，梨形，常见无翅型和有翅型；腹末有一对角状管。
habits: 许多种类可孤雌生殖并快速扩增，在嫩梢、嫩叶和花器上群集取食，通风差和氮肥高时更易暴发。
body_length_en: Adults are generally 1-4 mm long.
distribution_en: Widely distributed in croplands, orchards, greenhouses, and ornamental plant systems worldwide.
active_season_en: Population growth is fastest in warm seasons, and infestations may persist year-round in protected cultivation.
description_en: Aphids are typical sap-sucking pests. They directly remove plant sap, excrete honeydew, and frequently transmit plant viruses.
morphology_en: Individuals are soft-bodied and pear-shaped, with winged and wingless forms often present. A pair of cornicles is usually visible near the abdomen tip.
habits_en: Many species reproduce rapidly by parthenogenesis and cluster on tender shoots, leaves, and flowers. High nitrogen input and poor airflow often promote outbreaks.

body_length: 幼虫约 30-40 mm，成虫翅展约 40-50 mm
distribution: 分布于欧洲、亚洲等温带蔬菜种植区，在十字花科作物田较常见。
active_season: 春末至秋季发生，夏秋季蔬菜田危害较重。
description: 甘蓝夜蛾主要危害甘蓝、白菜等十字花科蔬菜，幼虫啃食叶片并可钻入叶球内部。
morphology: 幼虫体色绿褐至灰褐，背线较明显；成虫前翅灰褐并有较清楚的环纹和肾纹。
habits: 卵多产于叶背，幼虫夜间取食，白天伏于叶丛或土表缝隙；连作菜地更易积累虫源。
body_length_en: Larvae are about 30-40 mm long and adults have a wingspan of roughly 40-50 mm.
distribution_en: Distributed across temperate vegetable-growing regions of Europe and Asia, especially in brassica fields.
active_season_en: Occurs from late spring to autumn, with summer and autumn damage often being more serious in vegetable crops.
description_en: The cabbage armyworm mainly damages cabbage, Chinese cabbage, and other brassicas. Larvae chew leaves and may bore into heading tissues.
morphology_en: Larvae vary from greenish brown to grayish brown and usually show a clear dorsal line. Adults are gray-brown with obvious orbicular and kidney-shaped forewing marks.
habits_en: Eggs are usually laid on leaf undersides. Larvae feed at night and hide in foliage or soil cracks by day. Continuous vegetable production often increases local pressure.

body_length: 幼虫约 25-30 mm，成虫翅展约 25-38 mm
distribution: 全球温暖地区广泛分布，是蔬菜和经济作物重要害虫。
active_season: 高温季节世代重叠明显，露地多在 5-10 月发生。
description: 甜菜夜蛾食性极杂，可危害葱蒜、豆类、茄果和棉花等作物，常造成叶片穿孔和严重失叶。
morphology: 幼虫颜色多变，体侧有明显浅色线；成虫较小，前翅灰褐并带浅色肾纹区。
habits: 雌蛾常成块产卵并覆毛，幼虫低龄群集、高龄分散取食，抗药性发展风险较高。
body_length_en: Larvae are about 25-30 mm long and adults have a wingspan of roughly 25-38 mm.
distribution_en: Widely distributed in warm regions worldwide and important in vegetables and field crops.
active_season_en: Generations overlap in hot seasons and field infestations are common from May to October.
description_en: The beet armyworm is highly polyphagous and damages onions, beans, solanaceous crops, cotton, and many others, often causing defoliation and shot-hole injury.
morphology_en: Larvae vary in color but usually show a pale lateral stripe. Adults are relatively small and gray-brown with a lighter kidney-shaped wing area.
habits_en: Females lay egg masses covered with scales. Young larvae feed gregariously and older larvae disperse. Resistance development is a common management concern.

body_length: 幼虫约 25-35 mm，成虫翅展约 30-38 mm
distribution: 见于欧洲和亚洲部分温带地区，可危害豆科、亚麻等作物。
active_season: 春末至夏季较常见，花蕾和嫩荚阶段危害明显。
description: 亚麻芽虫主要危害花蕾、嫩荚和幼嫩组织，发生后可造成落蕾、落花和结实不良。
morphology: 幼虫体色绿色、褐色或带斑纹，变化较大；成虫前翅黄褐至橄榄褐色。
habits: 幼虫偏好取食花器和嫩荚，常隐蔽于花蕾内部；温暖少雨天气下更利于种群增长。
body_length_en: Larvae are about 25-35 mm long and adults have a wingspan of roughly 30-38 mm.
distribution_en: Recorded in parts of Europe and Asia and associated with flax, legumes, and other broadleaf crops.
active_season_en: Usually seen from late spring into summer, with the most visible injury on buds, flowers, and young pods.
description_en: The flax budworm damages buds, flowers, and young pods, reducing fruit set and crop quality when infestations are heavy.
morphology_en: Larval coloration is variable and may be green, brown, or mottled. Adults are yellowish brown to olive brown on the forewings.
habits_en: Larvae prefer reproductive tissues and often remain concealed within buds or flowers. Warm, relatively dry weather can favor development.

body_length: 成虫体长差异较大，常见种约 20-60 mm
distribution: 广布于草地、农田和半干旱生态系统，温暖开阔环境常见。
active_season: 多在春夏至初秋活动，干热年份更易形成高密度群体。
description: 蝗总科是直翅目中与蝗虫、蚱蜢等相关的重要类群，成员多具强咀嚼式口器，可大量啃食禾草与作物叶片。
morphology: 后足发达善跳跃，前翅革质、后翅膜质，触角多较短。
habits: 多数种类取食叶片和嫩茎，在干旱少雨、草料丰富的条件下种群增长较快，局部可出现聚集迁移。
body_length_en: Adult body size varies widely by species, commonly around 20-60 mm.
distribution_en: Common in grasslands, croplands, and semi-arid ecosystems, especially in open and warm habitats.
active_season_en: Most active from spring through early autumn, with higher densities more likely in dry and hot years.
description_en: Locustoidea is a superfamily-level locust and grasshopper group within Orthoptera. Members are chewing herbivores and some species can consume large amounts of grasses and crop foliage.
morphology_en: Hind legs are well developed for jumping. Forewings are leathery and hindwings membranous. Antennae are typically shorter than the body.
habits_en: Most members feed on leaves and tender stems. In dry conditions with abundant forage, some populations can build rapidly and show mass movement or aggregation.

body_length: 成虫常见 10-20 mm
distribution: 广见于豆科作物和花生、蔬菜等田块，温暖季节更常见。
active_season: 夏季到初秋为成虫取食高峰。
description: 豆芫菁通常指以豆科作物为主要取食对象的芫菁类群，成虫会咬食叶片、花和嫩荚，严重时影响结荚。
morphology: 成虫体软而狭长，鞘翅较柔软，多具黄黑相间斑纹，受扰时可分泌斑蝥素。
habits: 成虫白天活动并啃食地上部组织；幼虫发育方式复杂，部分种类早龄幼虫可寄生或捕食其他昆虫卵。
body_length_en: Adults commonly measure around 10-20 mm.
distribution_en: Common in warm seasons in legume fields and also found in groundnut, vegetable, and flowering crop systems.
active_season_en: Adults are most noticeable from summer to early autumn.
description_en: Legume blister beetles are a crop-associated blister beetle group that feed on leaves, flowers, and young pods of legumes, sometimes reducing pod set.
morphology_en: Adults are soft-bodied and elongate, often with black-and-yellow warning-like markings. They may exude cantharidin-containing body fluids when disturbed.
habits_en: Adults feed on aboveground tissues in daylight. Larval development is complex, and early stages in some species are associated with other insects or insect eggs.

body_length: 成虫多为 10-25 mm
distribution: 广泛分布于干热农田、草地和开阔生境。
active_season: 夏季最常见，开花作物上易聚集。
description: 芫菁科昆虫成虫多取食叶片、花朵和嫩组织，局部高密度时可对作物形成显著危害。
morphology: 体壁较软，头部明显，前胸狭于头和鞘翅；很多种类色彩鲜明。
habits: 成虫常在晴天活动并群集取食花器，体液含斑蝥素，对人畜有刺激性；幼虫发育阶段复杂。
body_length_en: Adults are commonly 10-25 mm long.
distribution_en: Widely distributed in open, dry farmland, rangeland, and flowering vegetation.
active_season_en: Most common in summer, especially around flowering hosts.
description_en: Blister beetles are a soft-bodied beetle group whose adults often feed on leaves, flowers, and tender plant tissues, occasionally causing visible field damage.
morphology_en: Adults usually have a narrow pronotum, soft elytra, and a distinctly exposed head. Many species show bright warning coloration.
habits_en: Adults often aggregate on flowers during sunny periods. Body fluids contain cantharidin, and larval development includes multiple specialized stages.

body_length: 成虫一般 1-2 mm
distribution: 广泛分布于蔬菜、花卉、果树和大田作物系统中。
active_season: 高温干燥季节繁殖快，设施栽培可常年发生。
description: 蓟马类昆虫体型微小但危害重，可锉吸叶片、花器和果面，造成银白斑、畸形，并可传播多种植物病毒。
morphology: 体细长，翅狭而边缘具长缘毛；口器为锉吸式。
habits: 喜隐藏在嫩叶、花器和缝隙中取食，种群增长快，对高温低湿环境适应较强。
body_length_en: Adults are usually 1-2 mm long.
distribution_en: Widely distributed in vegetables, ornamentals, fruit crops, and field crops.
active_season_en: Population growth is rapid in hot and dry weather, and infestations may persist year-round in protected cultivation.
description_en: Thrips are tiny but important rasping-sucking pests. They scar leaves, flowers, and fruit surfaces and can transmit several important plant viruses.
morphology_en: Adults are slender with narrow wings fringed with long hairs. Mouthparts are adapted for rasping and sucking plant tissues.
habits_en: They hide in young leaves, flowers, and crevices, reproduce quickly, and thrive under hot, dry conditions.

body_length: 幼虫常为 10-30 mm，成虫多较小至中等
distribution: 广泛见于亚洲等温暖地区林木、果树和园林植物上。
active_season: 晚春至秋季可见幼虫取食，南方发生期更长。
description: 刺蛾科幼虫常被称为刺毛虫或蛞蝓毛虫，取食叶片并可造成明显缺刻，部分种类具毒刺可刺激皮肤。
morphology: 幼虫体扁平，行动像蛞蝓，常具分枝刺突或毒毛；成虫体短粗，翅较宽。
habits: 幼虫多在叶面活动取食，受扰时不易脱离寄主；一些种类在果树、茶树和林木上具间歇性暴发特点。
body_length_en: Larvae are commonly 10-30 mm long, while adults are usually small to medium-sized moths.
distribution_en: Common on trees, fruit crops, and ornamental plants in warm parts of Asia and other suitable regions.
active_season_en: Larval feeding is most often seen from late spring through autumn, with longer seasons in southern areas.
description_en: Limacodidae, the slug caterpillar moth family, includes leaf-feeding larvae that may also bear stinging spines. Some species periodically injure fruit trees, tea, or landscape plants.
morphology_en: Larvae are flattened and slug-like, often with branched spines or urticating structures. Adults are short-bodied moths with relatively broad wings.
habits_en: Larvae feed openly on leaves and may be difficult to dislodge. Some species show intermittent outbreaks on perennial hosts.

body_length: 成虫体长约 20-27 mm
distribution: 原产东亚，现已扩散至北美等地，在葡萄、果树和园林树木上受到高度关注。
active_season: 若虫多见于春夏，成虫在夏末至秋季较多。
description: 斑衣蜡蝉为重要外来害虫，成若虫刺吸树液并分泌大量蜜露，可诱发煤污病并削弱寄主树势。
morphology: 成虫前翅灰色具黑斑，后翅鲜红、黑白对比明显；若虫早龄黑底白斑，末龄转为红色。
habits: 喜在多种木本寄主上取食，产卵于树皮和光滑表面；成虫跳跃和短距离飞翔能力较强。
body_length_en: Adults are about 20-27 mm long.
distribution_en: Native to East Asia but now established in North America and other regions, where it is closely watched on grapes, fruit trees, and ornamental trees.
active_season_en: Nymphs are mostly present in spring and summer, while adults are abundant from late summer into autumn.
description_en: The spotted lanternfly is an important invasive sap-feeding pest. Nymphs and adults remove plant sap and excrete large amounts of honeydew, which promotes sooty mold and weakens hosts.
morphology_en: Adults have gray forewings with black spots and striking red hindwings with black and white patches. Early instar nymphs are black with white spots, while late instars become red.
habits_en: They feed on many woody hosts and lay eggs on bark and smooth surfaces. Adults jump readily and make short flights.

body_length: 成虫通常 8-25 mm，因种而异
distribution: 分布广泛，多见于林木、果树和木本植物资源丰富地区。
active_season: 多在春末至夏季羽化活动，幼虫全年可在木质部内发育。
description: Xylotrechus 为天牛科中一类典型蛀干害虫属，幼虫钻蛀枝干和木质部，可削弱树势并降低木材或果树价值。
morphology: 成虫体狭长，多具黄黑相间横斑或带纹；幼虫乳白无足，头部褐色，典型木蠹型。
habits: 成虫在树干裂缝或受伤部位产卵，幼虫蛀道可长期存在；受害植株常伴随虫粪、排孔和枝梢衰弱。
body_length_en: Adults usually range from 8-25 mm depending on the species.
distribution_en: Widely distributed where woody hosts are abundant, including forests, orchards, and urban trees.
active_season_en: Adults usually emerge from late spring into summer, while larvae may develop in wood throughout the year.
description_en: Xylotrechus is a wood-boring longhorn beetle genus. Larvae tunnel in branches, trunks, and woody tissues, weakening trees and reducing timber or orchard value.
morphology_en: Adults are elongate and often marked with yellow-and-black transverse bands. Larvae are creamy white, legless, and adapted for boring in wood.
habits_en: Adults lay eggs in bark crevices and weakened tissues. Larval galleries are often accompanied by frass, exit holes, and progressive branch decline.

body_length: 成虫体长约 7.5-9 mm
distribution: 广布于欧洲和亚洲温带地区，常见于湿润草地、田边和禾本科植被上。
active_season: 晚春至秋季较常见。
description: 绿叶蝉为叶蝉科常见种，主要刺吸草本植物汁液，在农田周边和禾本科植被中易见。
morphology: 成虫鲜绿色，体形楔状，头胸较宽，后足善跳跃。
habits: 多在草本寄主上活动和产卵，受惊时迅速跳离；高草覆盖和湿润环境有利于种群维持。
body_length_en: Adults are about 7.5-9 mm long.
distribution_en: Widely distributed in temperate parts of Europe and Asia, especially in moist grasslands and grassy field margins.
active_season_en: Most common from late spring to autumn.
description_en: Cicadella viridis is a common green leafhopper that feeds on grasses and herbaceous plants. It is often encountered around agricultural fields and grassy vegetation.
morphology_en: Adults are bright green and wedge-shaped, with broad heads and strong hind legs for jumping.
habits_en: They stay on grasses and herbaceous hosts, jump quickly when disturbed, and are favored by dense, moist vegetation.

body_length: 成虫常见 2-10 mm
distribution: 广泛分布于农田、果园和自然植被环境中。
active_season: 春夏秋均可见，嫩梢和花器多时数量增加。
description: 盲蝽科是半翅目中种类极多的类群，许多种类刺吸芽、花、果和嫩叶，造成畸形、褐斑和落花落果。
morphology: 体形柔软，前翅末端具典型楔片，口器细长适于刺吸。
habits: 成虫和若虫多在寄主表面活动，部分种类昼夜均可取食；杂草丰富和花期长的田块常更有利于其存活。
body_length_en: Adults commonly range from 2-10 mm in length.
distribution_en: Widely distributed in croplands, orchards, and natural vegetation.
active_season_en: Present through spring, summer, and autumn, especially when tender shoots and flowers are abundant.
description_en: Miridae, the plant bug family, contains many sap-feeding species that injure buds, flowers, fruits, and young leaves, leading to distortion, spotting, or shedding.
morphology_en: Bodies are relatively soft, and the forewings usually bear a distinct cuneus. Mouthparts are slender and adapted for piercing and sucking.
habits_en: Adults and nymphs feed on plant surfaces, and some species remain active both day and night. Flowering crops and weedy habitats often support larger populations.

body_length: 幼虫约 30-40 mm，成虫翅展约 30-38 mm
distribution: 广布于亚洲及热带、亚热带地区，是多种蔬菜和经济作物重要害虫。
active_season: 高温季节繁殖迅速，南方春末至秋季连续发生。
description: 斜纹夜蛾为高度杂食性夜蛾害虫，可危害豆类、蔬菜、棉花和花生等，大发生时造成明显失叶和嫩部损伤。
morphology: 幼虫体侧具明显纵带和半月形斑纹；成虫前翅暗褐带复杂波纹。
habits: 雌蛾成块产卵并覆毛，低龄幼虫群集取食，高龄幼虫分散且夜间取食强；高温和连作可促进暴发。
body_length_en: Larvae are about 30-40 mm long and adults have a wingspan of roughly 30-38 mm.
distribution_en: Widely distributed in tropical and subtropical Asia and important in vegetables and cash crops.
active_season_en: Develops quickly in hot weather and can occur continuously from late spring through autumn in southern areas.
description_en: Spodoptera litura is a highly polyphagous noctuid pest that attacks vegetables, legumes, peanuts, cotton, and many other crops, often causing severe defoliation.
morphology_en: Larvae usually show conspicuous longitudinal bands and crescent-like markings on the body. Adults have dark, patterned forewings.
habits_en: Females lay egg masses covered with scales. Young larvae feed together, whereas older larvae disperse and feed strongly at night. Warm weather and continuous cropping favor outbreaks.

body_length: 成虫常见 3-10 mm
distribution: 广泛分布于农田、草地、果园和林缘植被中。
active_season: 温暖季节发生普遍，春夏到初秋最常见。
description: 叶蝉科为典型跳跃性刺吸害虫类群，许多成员吸食叶片汁液，部分种类还能传播植原体和植物病毒。
morphology: 体形楔状，后足胫节多具刺列，善跳跃；颜色和斑纹变化丰富。
habits: 多栖息于叶背或草丛，受惊即跳离；在杂草寄主和作物间迁移频繁，是田间病虫复合传播的重要群体。
body_length_en: Adults commonly range from 3-10 mm.
distribution_en: Widely distributed in croplands, grasslands, orchards, and vegetation around field margins.
active_season_en: Common through warm seasons, especially from spring to early autumn.
description_en: Cicadellidae, the leafhopper family, includes many jumping sap-feeding pests. Some members also vector phytoplasmas and plant viruses.
morphology_en: Leafhoppers are wedge-shaped, with rows of spines on the hind tibiae and strong jumping ability. Body color and pattern vary widely among species.
habits_en: They often occupy leaf undersides or grassy hosts and jump away when disturbed. Movement between weeds and crops makes them important in field disease and pest complexes.
